🏢 About Us

Backed by 130 years of trust

Transportation fueled with technology — from Sanghvi Group to your doorstep.

HailO by Transtrade

At HailO by Transtrade, we believe convenience should feel effortless and dependable. Whether it's a meal, medicines, groceries, or an important package, HailO connects you to essential services across your city — handled with care and attention at every step.

Backed by Transtrade's logistics expertise, we're focused on creating a delivery experience that's not just easy but also safe, reliable, and consistent.

🎯 Vision

Deliver highest quality services through innovation — uplifting the entire transport industry.

🚀 Mission

Become India's most preferred logistics aggregator with supreme performance and cost control.

⭐ Est. 1890 — Kolhapur

Sanghvi Group Legacy

Established in 1890, Sanghvi Group has excelled across Construction, Exports, Investment, Gold & Silver Trade over 6 generations. Transtrade carries forward the same trust, innovation, and quality the Sanghvi Group is known for — now reimagined for modern logistics.

Transtrade — Aggregator Model

Transtrade matches shippers with their desired transporters. Built by industry experts, this innovative system is the one-stop solution for all transportation needs — extending pan-India with interstate and inter-region support.

🚚 HailO Logistics

Send anything, anywhere —
reliably & safely

From 2-wheelers to 17ft trucks — book, track, and deliver with complete peace of mind.

Welcome Screen

Enter your mobile number to get started — simple & secure

OTP Verification

Verify instantly via WhatsApp or SMS — no passwords needed

Registration

Set up your profile in seconds — username, name & email

Home Screen

Choose Tempo or 2-Wheeler for your delivery needs

Pickup on Map

Pin your exact pickup location on Google Maps

Drop on Map

Confirm your drop location with consignee details

Select Goods Type

Choose what you're sending — food, furniture, pharma & more

Select Vehicle

Pick from 2-Wheeler to 17ft truck based on load size

Review & Book

Check full fare summary before confirming your booking

Booking Confirmed

Driver search begins — real-time status updates

Live Tracking

Track your driver live with secure OTP handoff

Consignment Note

Download your official digital delivery receipt

🚛 Fleet Options — Choose Your Vehicle

VehicleCapacityBest ForETA
🏍️ 2 Wheeler20 kgSmall parcels, documents~1 min
🛵 Scooter20 kgLight deliveries, medicines~1 min
🚛 Tata Ace750 kgMedium goods, appliances~2 mins
🚐 Pickup 8ft1200 kgLarge furniture, bulk goods~11 mins
🚐 Pickup 9ft1700 kgHeavy machinery, bulk~13 mins
🚚 14ft Truck3500 kgHouse shiftingOn request
🚛 17ft Truck4500 kgIndustrial cargo, large moves~14 mins

📋 Booking & Cancellation Policy

✅

Free Cancellation

Cancel before driver is assigned — zero charges, no questions asked. Instant refund if prepaid.

⚠️

After Assignment

A small cancellation fee may apply. Reason selection required — driver delay, wrong vehicle, etc.

🔄

Auto-Cancellation

Booking auto-cancelled if no driver found in 9:49 mins. You're notified instantly — rebook anytime.

⏱️

Free 60 mins loading & unloading included

💸

Extra time charged at ₹4 per minute

🛣️

Fare may vary if route or location changes

🅿️

Parking fees borne by the consignor

🧾

Toll & permit charges billed separately

🚫

Overloading strictly not permitted

the smart way

Set pickup & drop via GPS or enter address manually

Select Category

Pharmacy, Bakery, Hotel, Stationery — pick your need

Nearby Shops

Top rated shops near you, ranked by distance & rating

Place Your Order

Type items in chat or upload prescription photo

Agent Dispatch

Nearest Deli agent accepts your order automatically

Order Accepted

Bill confirmed — pay via UPI & track delivery live

⚡ Order Types

Two ways to order — you choose

⚡

Quick Order

"Need it fast? Just drop your location"
  • Only delivery location needed
  • Nearby shops auto-suggested
  • Fastest way to order
  • Perfect for everyday needs
🎯

Custom Order

"Need something specific? You're in control"
  • Select both pickup & drop
  • Ask Deli to buy specific items
  • Multiple Delis can bid on fare
  • Perfect for special/bulk orders

🔄 Process

From tap to doorstep

Simple steps. Zero confusion. Just delivery.

📍
Step 01

Tap & Set Location

Open the HailO app and enter your pickup & drop address via GPS or Google Maps pin.

🚛
Step 02

Choose Your Vehicle

Select from 2-Wheeler to 17ft truck based on your goods type, weight, and size.

📋
Step 03

Review & Book

Check the complete fare summary including toll, net fare, and payment method — confirm in one tap.

👷
Step 04

Driver Assigned

Nearest driver accepts your booking — you get real-time GPS tracking with a secure OTP handoff.

✅
Step 05

Delivered & Done

Goods delivered safely — download your official digital Consignment Note for records.

📍
Step 01

Set Your Location

Open Delis app — set pickup & delivery location via GPS or enter manually.

🗂️
Step 02

Select Category & Shop

Choose Pharmacy, Bakery, Hotel, or Stationery — pick from top 5 nearby shops ranked by distance & rating.

💬
Step 03

Place Your Order

Type items directly in chat or upload a prescription photo — shop owner receives it instantly.

🏪
Step 04

Shop Confirms

Shop owner replies with item availability and total bill — you confirm the order.

🛵
Step 05

Deli Agent Dispatched

Nearest Deli agent gets a broadcast notification — first to accept gets assigned to your delivery.

💳
Step 06

Pay & Receive

Pay instantly via UPI — your order is on its way to your doorstep.

⚙️ Platform

Everything you need, built in

Six core capabilities powering every HailO & Delis delivery.

📱

OTP-Based Login

Secure mobile number verification via WhatsApp or SMS OTP — no passwords, no friction.

🗺️

Map-Based Addresses

Google Maps integration for precise pickup & drop — pin it, confirm it, done.

🚛

Multi-Vehicle Fleet

2-Wheeler to 17ft trucks — every vehicle type with real-time availability & fare estimates.

📡

Live Driver Tracking

Real-time GPS tracking with secure OTP handoff and downloadable consignment notes.

💬

Chat-Based Ordering

Order directly from local shop owners via real-time chat — no menus, no barriers.

💳

UPI Payment

Seamless in-app UPI payment once order is confirmed — instant, secure, hassle-free.

👥 Who is it for?

Built for everyone

Three roles, one ecosystem — every person in the delivery chain benefits.

  • 1

    Open App & Set Location

    Use GPS or enter pickup & delivery address manually.

  • 2

    Browse & Select

    Pick a category, choose from nearby shops ranked by rating & distance.

  • 3

    Chat & Order

    Type your items or upload prescription — shop confirms instantly.

  • 4

    Track & Pay

    Deli agent picks up — pay via UPI when order is confirmed.

✨ Customer Benefits

  • 📍 GPS-based nearby shop discovery
  • 💬 Direct chat with shop — no menus
  • 📋 Upload prescription for pharmacy orders
  • 📡 Real-time order status tracking
  • 💳 Instant UPI payment
  • 📦 Order history & reorder option
  • 1

    Register Your Shop

    Join Delis as a verified shop partner — easy setup, no tech knowledge needed.

  • 2

    Receive Chat Orders

    Customer orders come directly via chat — confirm availability & send bill.

  • 3

    Deli Picks Up

    Once order is confirmed, the assigned Deli agent comes to your shop for pickup.

  • 4

    Track Sales

    View order history, sales summary and manage your shop profile in-app.

🏪 Shop Owner Benefits

  • 📈 Reach more customers without leaving shop
  • 💬 Orders via direct chat — simple & fast
  • 🛵 Deli agent handles all delivery
  • 📊 Sales history & order dashboard
  • 🔒 Verified partner status builds trust
  • ⚙️ Easy setup — no tech knowledge needed
  • 1

    Get Broadcast Notification

    Receive nearby delivery requests — see shop location, delivery location & earning amount.

  • 2

    Accept the Order

    First Deli to accept gets assigned — view full details before committing.

  • 3

    Pick Up from Shop

    Head to the shop, collect the order and confirm pickup in app.

  • 4

    Deliver & Earn

    Deliver to customer — earning credited to your account after completion.

🛵 Deli Agent Benefits

  • 💰 See earning before you accept
  • 🕐 Work on your own schedule
  • 📡 Real-time order notifications
  • 🗺️ Route & distance shown upfront
  • 📊 Weekly earning summary in app
  • 🚀 First accept = immediate assignment

❓ FAQ

Frequently asked questions

What can I order on HailO?
+
Food, medicines, groceries, and parcels — everything you need in one place. HailO handles goods delivery with vehicles ranging from 2-wheelers to 17ft trucks, while Delis handles hyperlocal shop orders.
Is parcel delivery available?
+
Yes! You can send packages anywhere within the city using HailO. Choose from multiple vehicle types based on your goods size and weight. Every booking comes with a digital consignment note.
Is it safe to use HailO & Delis?
+
Absolutely. Every order is OTP-verified, every driver is tracked in real-time, and every delivery comes with a secure handoff. For pharmacy orders, you can upload prescriptions safely in-app.
How does the Delis app work?
+
Set your location → Select a category (Pharmacy/Bakery/Hotel/Stationery) → Pick a nearby shop → Type your order in chat or upload a prescription → Shop confirms & Deli agent delivers → Pay via UPI.
How do I become a Deli agent or partner?
+
Use the "Partner With Us" section above or fill the contact form. We'll get back to you with onboarding details. Deli agents can work on their own schedule with no fixed shifts, earning per delivery.
